name_en: 🆕 【Top Original】M62472 Hardware 👏👏 Soft yet powerful style, this compact Victorine wallet is the perfect choice for everyday carry. The iconic Monogram canvas is paired with colorful leather lining, offering a stylish look while ensuring secure storage and easy access for credit cards and personal items. Dimensions: 12x9cm, Packaging: Includes box.
